notes: Chip rout deepening (Nasdaq futures -1.5%) after Netflix whiff, plus hot PCE at a 3-year high and tariff/Iran jitters; VIX jumped to 18.5. Cutting to 0.35 risk-off — tech/semis and crypto under pressure, only defensives (ABT, VOD, REZI) holding up.
journal_entry: Fri 7/17 09:00: dropped to 0.35 risk-off (from 0.5 neutral) as VIX spiked 16.6->18.5. Chip sell-off + Netflix miss hammering Nasdaq, hot PCE inflation and tariff headlines add macro risk. Added META/QQQ to avoids given tech weakness; leaning into defensives ABT/VOD/REZI/JXN/SPY. Watching whether semis stabilize and if breadth breaks down further.
